name: hb_2_2
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Zanhuang County (district_id 15) over 2025-06-01 to 2025-06-07 compute and store the district-level AQI: mean_aqi, max_aqi (float), exceedance_hours (AQI>100, int); and the spatial consistency across the county's monitoring points: n_stations (int), spatial_std_aqi (population std of per-station mean AQI, float).

turns.query: valuate weekly air quality trends in Zanhuang County from 2025-06-01 to 2025-06-07, analyzing spatial consistency across monitoring points.
